user.title: CAME Connect — Credentials
user.description: Enter your CAME Connect OAuth credentials. You can find client_id and client_secret in the CAME Connect developer portal.

device.title: CAME Connect — Device
device.description: Credentials verified. Now configure the device to control.

data.device_name: Device name (e.g. Main Gate, Garage Door)
data.device_id: Device ID (numeric ID visible in the CAME Connect app)

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your Client ID, Client Secret, username and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the CAME Connect cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
